body:
# Lizka Vaintrob

**Role:** Researcher

[Lizka Vaintrob](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lizka-vaintrob/) spent around 3 years producing content for the [Centre for Effective Altruism](https://www.centreforeffectivealtruism.org/) and [Rethink Priorities](https://rethinkpriorities.org/). She graduated from Columbia with a double major in Mathematics and Comparative Literature.
